title: TransitionLifecycle
description: Full governance chain record for a constitutional state transition

transition_id.description: Unique identifier for this transition lifecycle

source_surface.description: The surface through which this transition was initiated

objective.description: Human-readable description of the transition's intent

intent_ref.description: Optional reference to an IntentPacket intent_id

cps_ref.description: Optional reference to a CPSPacket cps_id

proof_ref.description: Optional reference to a ProofEntry proof_id (PRF-XXXXXXXX)

state_deltas.description: Ordered list of typed state deltas produced by this transition

sovereign.description: True if this transition required and satisfied sovereign quorum

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the transition began

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value surface metadata (call_sid, caller, etc.)
